# CI-only tool constraint ranges (managed by dependabot via pip ecosystem).
# Intentionally wider than pyproject.toml caret constraints — these install
# standalone CLI tools, not importable libraries, so exact sync is unnecessary.
docstr-coverage>=2.3.2,<3.0.0
vulture>=2.16,<3.0.0
bandit>=1.9.4,<2.0.0
tach>=0.34.1,<1.0.0
mypy>=1.13,<2.0
